must_do.full_text:
🌘 Kimi-K2.7-Code, our latest coding model, is now released and open-sourced!

🔷 Improved coding & agent performance over K2.6: +21.8% on Kimi Code Bench v2, +11.0% on Program Bench, and +31.5% on MLS Bench Lite.
🔷 Reasoning efficiency: Less overthinking, with 30% lower https://t.co/jFS7I40avs

"Late last week the Anthropic Institute released a new safety report warning about the danger of recursive self-improvement... I don’t think the timing is a coincidence.

Starting today, we’re rolling out the ability to save rate limit resets to use later.

We’re starting Go, Plus, Pro, and Business users with one free reset: https://t.co/gucyTi04wc

must_do.full_text:

Codex can use the Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) to debug browser issues by profiling JavaScript performance and inspecting console output, network traffic, and page state. https://t.co/JTFjgCHmgI

must_do.full_text:
Fable 5を2日間使った感想
・IQは最強でGPT-5.5 pro の比ではない
・EQは高いのにKYで、真実を追求する
・ビジネスなど人間世界の理解が半端ない
・現実世界に適用できる提案力も半端ない
・なのに回答スピードは比較的速い
・主力LLMの座はGPT-5.5 proから交代
must_do.summary: 用户使用Fable 5两天体验：智商超群、情商高但缺乏察言观色、商业理解深、回答速度快，已取代GPT-5.5 Pro。
angles: Fable 5实测：终于有模型能打败GPT-5.5 Pro
IQ天花板、EQ有缺陷，Fable 5的真实面目
两天用下来，我的主力LLM换人了

priority.full_text:
I'm burning 50% less weekly Claude Code limits now.

1. Install OpenAI Codex plugin inside Claude Code

2. Then use: 
> Claude Fable 5 high for planning
> Codex 5.5 xhigh for execution (using Codex plan, no API)
> Claude Fable 5 max for review

That's it. It works. https://t.co/mCjNgjuauW
priority.summary: 用户分享Claude Code成本优化方案：结合Claude Fable和OpenAI Codex插件，周度限额消耗降低50%。具体工具组合方案，实用性强。
angles: Claude Code成本优化秘诀：50%限额消耗降低方案
Fable+Codex组合技：规划+执行+审查三步法

backup.full_text:
You should basically never use Fable for coding, but instead use it as a planner/orchestrator.

Most of today's advanced models can implement a spec perfectly, and once done you can send the work to Fable to review.

This has been my most powerful flow so far.
backup.summary: 使用建议：Fable不应用于编码，而应作为规划/编排工具，配合高级模型实现完整工作流。
angles: Fable用法反转：不编码，做规划
最强工作流：Fable+高级模型的完美配合
提示工程师必知：Fable的正确打开方式
